title: Trident Fusion
description: Trident Fusion gives the classic Minecraft trident a cleaner, more refined appearance
body:
## 📦 Trident Fusion
**Trident Fusion** is a Java Edition resource pack that refreshes the Minecraft **trident textures** with cleaner, more refined visuals. The pack keeps the iconic **trident style** while subtly enhancing details for a polished look.

**Requires** [**EMF**](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY) **and** [**ETF**](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1) **or OptiFine**

✅ **Recommended for players who:**

- Want a **cleaner,** **enhanced trident appearance**

- Prefer **subtle texture improvements** that complement Minecraft’s original style

💬 If you want to **share feedback** or **ideas** about the project, please leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/trident-fusion/comments)

Inspired by **Actions & Stuff**

![Trident Underwater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60847b9f3ee96410a797c7fa6ec4b9305c9fc371.png)
